title: March 18
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|March}}

'''March 18''' is the 77th day of the year (78th in leap years). There are 288 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1930s#1931|1931]] – [[John Mollo]] is born.
*[[1978]] – [[Leigh Brackett]] dies.
*[[1981]] – [[Paul Davis]] is born.
*[[1982]] – [[Adam Pally]] is born.
*[[1998]] – [[Crimson Empire 4|''Crimson Empire'' 4]] published.
*[[2005]] – ''[[A Hunter's Fate: Greedo's Tale (webstrip)]]'' finishes on [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]].
*[[2009]] – [[Knights of the Old Republic 39|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 39]] published.
*[[2015]] – [[Princess Leia 2|''Princess Leia'' 2]] published.
*2015 – [[Star Wars Rebels Magazine 3|''Star Wars Rebels'' Magazine 3]] published in Germany.
*[[2017]] – "[[Twin Suns (episode)|Twin Suns]]" airs on [[Disney XD]].
*[[2019]] - ''[[Star Wars: Force Arena]]'' is shut down.
*[[2020]] – [[Star Wars (2020) 4|''Star Wars'' (2020) 4]] published.
*2020 – [[Star Wars Adventures (2017) 31|''Star Wars Adventures'' (2017) 31]] published.
<noinclude>
